Don’t worry there’s still time to win dinner with President Trump in Ohio! Remember, we’ll cover your flight, your hotel room, and your meal.

Friend,

I'm only reaching out to my strongest supporters with this exclusive invite for a chance to have an EPIC dinner with me in one of my favorite states, Ohio.

If you win, all you have to do is choose your plus one to join us and my team will take care of:
* **Your hotel stay**
* **Your flight**
* **And your meal**

After our incredible meal, we'll get to talk in person for a bit and take a picture together to remember the moment forever. My favorite part!

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=68aa25e342e9514bcebd1775e35cde9566aceea507d0e4f50e2bbc141fde93f59ed022db29987da0f8506f34f2f30b3f53dbb2000d914101) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=68aa25e342e9514b0e83f7ab1765269e5f986e93afbdda373f69a945e9f864b5ac63ea5cafa0e437cad147e9d3342b3c4d20ca4f4a8e0356) or by texting “MARCHDINNER” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between March 5, 2019, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on March 15, 2019, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to a breakfast event featuring President Donald J. Trump (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=68aa25e342e9514bd0b6bb333b6fc47f926ae06afb3cb2eb34258d1b3b13de3da578eccf7316c41cf1eede26851e9e9145c251c4894ab66b) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=68aa25e342e9514b2f8cce8192adbc4ad008633e2b3974dca0ff9e9c2ef421d2497bb705377482a43a2993fd4362cb27ac4722c15d5feff3) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc53e1739dc85a58143456a95bdb6f260390deed506ea785c2528ec1cc2cd30709532d3768ba4e0e54da007036aa6908fd5416b9fe0428f3b1) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c673e37c913683c0b3eb9e51f5b55b3cc64c162d92440b49b5168d7e530f123043ef975d369e66c3c)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'm running to take the NRA head-on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
What it'll take to pass meaningful gun reform.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976aef/2ae112ef/1126cf45/357d040b/452703817/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976aef/2ae112ef/1126cf45/357d040b/452703817/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
Right now in our country, people are senselessly murdered every day by gun violence--many by a person who never should've had access to a gun in the first place. All the while, Congress has sat idly by and let it happen.
NRA-backed lawmakers have made it clear that they'll put big checks from the gun lobby over the lives of our families and loved ones _every time_. I refuse to let their cowardly inaction continue.
**I 'm running for president to take the NRA head-on and end their stranglehold on our gun laws. And I'm running to fix the corrupt and broken system that has silenced the voices of Americans for too long. Enough is enough.**
That's why I just reintroduced a bill that would stop the flow of gun trafficking and keep these weapons out of dangerous hands. It's a critical and commonsense step we can take to keep our kids and our communities safe. But the truth is that we won't be able to pass any meaningful gun safety reform until we get the NRA's money out of our elections--and this is one step in my all-in fight to do just that.
****[I'm counting on you to become one of the 2,000 supporters we need to sign our petition before midnight tonight to demand Congress finally take action on gun reform legislation that will save lives. Add your name now.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-gunreform?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2885-su-gfp-nd")****
The road to change is never easy, but I know we'll get there as long as we're in this together. Thank you for speaking out on such a crucial issue.
Kirsten
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976aef/2ae112ef/1126cf45/357d0475/452703817/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

"" "" Peter, Right now in our country, people are senselessly murdered every day by gun violence--many by a person who never should've had access to a gun in the first place. All the while, Congress has sat idly by and let it happen. NRA-backed lawmakers have made it clear that they'll put big checks from the gun lobby over the lives of our families and loved ones every time. I refuse to let their cowardly inaction continue. I 'm running for president to take the NRA head-on and end their stranglehold on our gun laws. And I'm running to fix the corrupt and broken system that has silenced the voices of Americans for too long. Enough is enough. That's why I just reintroduced a bill that would stop the flow of gun trafficking and keep these weapons out of dangerous hands. It's a critical and commonsense step we can take to keep our kids and our communities safe. But the truth is that we won't be able to pass any meaningful gun safety reform until we get the NRA's money out of our elections--and this is one step in my all-in fight to do just that. ** ""** The road to change is never easy, but I know we'll get there as long as we're in this together. Thank you for speaking out on such a crucial issue. Kirsten
